ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: RecordType.Name = "eMAC Sales Opportunity" && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Verbal Award") && (TEXT(Bid_Process__c) = ""|| ISPICKVAL(Division__c,"")|| ISNULL(Proposal_Date__c)|| ISNULL(Margin__c)|| ISNULL(Volume__c)|| ISNULL(Verbal_Award_Date__c) || ISNULL(Expected_Sign_Date__c) || ISNULL(Target_Contract_Start_Date__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: These fields are required: RFP Process, Division, Proposal Date, Total Margin, Annual Encounters, Verbal Award Date, Expected Sign Date, and Target Contract Start Date.
